items.title: Ange Postecoglou calls out Tottenham star live on ITV over glaring error in World Cup clash
items.summary: ANGE POSTECOGLOU pulled no punches when discussing his former player in his capacity as a World Cup pundit on ITV. items.title: ‘Are my ears failing me?’ – ITV viewers can’t believe song Netherlands chose for World Cup goal music
items.summary: FANS have been left in disbelief after the song choice the Netherlands have chosen for their goal music at the World Cup. items.title: 'Big goal from a big player!' - Van Dijk scores Netherlands opener
items.summary: Virgil van Dijk scores the opening goal in the Netherlands Group F match against Japan at the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Netherlands 2 Japan 2: Kamada scores last minute World Cup equaliser with bizarre header after Summerville wondergoal
items.summary: DARK HORSES is how most described Holland and Japan ahead of kick-off. It was fitting, then, that they met in Dallas - the city of cowboys and culture - where weekly rodeos reign supreme, and you’d look more out of place in a Tesla than on horseback. items.title: Arsenal & Liverpool in Bouaddi talks - Monday's gossip
items.summary: Arsenal and Liverpool are keen on Lille midfielder Ayyoub Bouaddi, Manchester City target a move for Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite, plus more.

items.title: ‘I could’ve punched myself in the face’ – Jurgen Klopp apologises to Germany manager on live TV over World Cup punditry
items.summary: JURGEN Klopp has apologised to Germany boss Julian Nagelsmann - saying he could have “punched himself in the face” over one badly-chosen word. items.title: Japan come from behind twice to draw with Netherlands
items.summary: Daichi Kamada's late header rescues a deserved point for Japan against the Netherlands in their opening World Cup game in Dallas.

items.title: World Cup teams reject Ceferin 'uninteresting' claim
items.summary: Uefa president Aleksander Ceferin has been criticised for reportedly claiming the World Cup expansion for the 2026 finals has led to 'uninteresting' games.

items.title: Summerville scores 'sizzler' as Netherlands retake lead
items.summary: Crysencio Summerville's "sizzler" of a goal helps Netherlands retake the lead against Japan in their Group F fixture at the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Fortune favours Kamada as Japan rescue World Cup draw with Netherlands
items.summary: The World Cup continued to produce the unexpected in Arlington. items.title: How Scotland’s once-in-a-lifetime World Cup triumph really felt for Tartan Army
items.summary: THIRTY-SIX years after travelling to see my first World Cup game, against Costa Rica, I finally witnessed that rarest of human experiences at the weekend. items.title: Uruguay team ‘BANNED from landing in USA over paperwork issues less than 24 hours before World Cup clash’
items.summary: THE World Cup could be thrown into fresh chaos as Uruguay are struggling to enter the United States. The South Americans are meant to play their first game of the competition on Monday against Saudi Arabia at 11pm UK time. items.title: World Cup stadium hides logo in most amusing way imaginable after being forced by Fifa to change name
items.summary: LEVI'S Stadium in California has had to get creative in order to hide their sponsor at the behest of Fifa.
